tagline: Senior SRE focused on reliability automation, observability, incident reduction, and resilient production operations at scale.
twoPageSummary: Senior Site Reliability Engineer with 16+ years in large-scale Azure and Microsoft production environments, specializing in incident automation, observability, operational playbooks, and telemetry-driven reliability improvements. portfolioSummary: Detailed SRE profile covering live-site operations, AI-assisted incident management, observability platforms, operational metrics, playbooks, and 24x7 support leadership.
